schema.description: ListMachineTypesResponse is the response for listing machine types.

items.description: MachineType represents a machine type available for sessions.

clusterName.description: The cluster where this machine type is available.

cpu.description: Display CPU string, for example, "4 vCPU".

isDefault.description:
Whether this is the deployment's default machine type. Clients preselect it
when the user has made no prior choice. At most one machine type name is
marked.

ram.description: Display RAM string, for example, "6 GB".

title.description:
Human-friendly title, for example, "M2 Pro Large". Empty when no friendly metadata
is available.
